title: How long until a sub translation is released do you think
display_title: How long until a sub translation is released do you think
wikitext:
[]: How long until a sub/translation is released do you think? Post by Son of Lilin » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:20 pm I'm not asking for links or anything, but how long do you think it will take for this movie to pop up online with English subtitles, official or otherwise? I want to know how long I'll have to resist looking at spoilers. How long did it take for 2.0?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:28 pm One's being worked on more or less in the Q Subforum.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: One's being worked on more or less in the Q Subforum.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:34 pm It's the special version(?) movie pamphlet, tons of spoilers are in it, naturally. And yeah, an English transcript is slowly being worked on.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: It's the special version(?) movie pamphlet, tons of spoilers are in it, naturally. And yeah, an English transcript is slowly being worked on.

[]: Re: How long until a sub/translation is released do you thin Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:42 pm Son of Lilin wrote: How long did it take for 2.0?

[]: Post by Unit88 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 12:50 pm Not sure if it hold much truth or not, but IMDB is showing a theatrical release for us Jan 11 of next year

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Nov 20, 2012 1:32 pm Unit88 wrote: Not sure if it hold much truth or not, but IMDB is showing a theatrical release for us Jan 11 of next year

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 1:45 pm Unit88 wrote: Not sure if it hold much truth or not, but IMDB is showing a theatrical release for us Jan 11 of next year

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 6:58 pm This is the page to watch for an American theatrical release date: http://elevenarts.net/ Nothing on 3.0 yet.

[]: Post by Redtophat » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:11 pm When the DVD/BD comes out, which will probably be like maybe 3 or a few more months. I heard most fansubbers hate working with camrips so it'll be a while.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:13 pm June wrote: maybe 3 or a few more months.

[]: Post by Redtophat » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Closer to a year, if 2.0 is any indication.

[]: Post by Jadley » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:46 pm June wrote: Dayum! For real!? I guess i'm watching the camrip, my first time will be unpleasant :(

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:50 pm Japanese DVD/BDs usually come out later (from premiere) than in west. Especially in case of anime features. I'd say Japanese release of 3.33 will probably be next summer.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 7:58 pm But if Khara plans to release 4.0 in 2013, it may prompt them to hasten the release of 3.33, right?

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Nov 20, 2012 8:02 pm riffraff11235 wrote: But if Khara plans to release 4.0 in 2013, it may prompt them to hasten the release of 3.33, right?

[]: Post by Jadley » Tue Nov 20, 2012 8:02 pm riffraff11235 wrote: But if Khara plans to release 4.0 in 2013, it may prompt them to hasten the release of 3.33, right?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Nov 21, 2012 5:39 pm I would assume that, IF FINAL is still being released next summer, then Funimation might be asked to WAIT until BOTH 3.0 and FINAL are on DVD and Blu-ray in Japan before a U.S. release. I have no basis for this other than it being the worst case scenario, aside from the films never coming to the States.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 22, 2012 4:58 am Translation will be done when it's done, and thread is off-topic anyway.
